results.title: Otters snap four game skid with win over ThunderBolts
results.description: EVANSVILLE, Ind. (WEHT) — The Evansville Otters even up the series with the Windy City ThunderBolts with a 5-0 victory in game two. The Otters can claim the series on July 19 with first pitch set for 5:05 p.m. at Bosse Field.

results.title: Chelsea Agree Club-Record £117m Deal To Sign Morgan Rogers From Aston Villa - Report
results.description: Chelsea have reportedly agreed a club-record £117 million (USD 157m) deal to sign Morgan Rogers from Aston Villa. Check transfer details, contract length, medical update, and why the England star chose Stamford Bridge
